semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for validating the document language selection and ordering logic.
responsibilities: Validates that getDocumentLanguageChoices returns stable languages first, followed by a disabled separator, then high-capacity languages.
Asserts the correct index and properties of the high-capacity language separator.
Verifies the default selected language values match expected defaults.
Ensures the HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR constant contains the expected descriptive note.
invariants: Test file suffix must be .test.ts or .spec.ts (compliant)

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure language selection logic is robust and follows defined ordering and separation rules.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Testing tier documentation language selection features.

English.role: Vitest unit test suite for validating the document language selection and ordering logic.
responsibilities: Validates that getDocumentLanguageChoices returns stable languages first, followed by a disabled separator, then high-capacity languages.
Asserts the correct index and properties of the high-capacity language separator.
Verifies the default selected language values match expected defaults.
Ensures the HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR constant contains the expected descriptive note.
